ns0:entry.ns0:title: anchore/syft
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/anchore/syft
Language: go
CLI tool and library for generating a Software Bill of Materials from container images and filesystems

ns0:entry.ns0:title: beclab/Olares
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/beclab/Olares
Language: go
Olares: An Open-Source Personal Cloud to Reclaim Your Data

ns0:entry.ns0:title: cloudnative-pg/cloudnative-pg
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/cloudnative-pg/cloudnative-pg
Language: go
CloudNativePG is a comprehensive platform designed to seamlessly manage PostgreSQL databases within Kubernetes environments, covering the entire operational lifecycle from initial deployment to ongoing maintenance

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/coder/coder
Language: go
Secure environments for developers and their agents

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dagger/dagger
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dagger/dagger
Language: go
Automation engine to build, test and ship any codebase. Runs locally, in CI, or directly in the cloud

ns0:entry.ns0:title: github/gh-aw
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/github/gh-aw
Language: go
GitHub Agentic Workflows

ns0:entry.ns0:title: go-gitea/gitea
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/go-gitea/gitea
Language: go
Git with a cup of tea! Painless self-hosted all-in-one software development service, including Git hosting, code review, team collaboration, package registry and CI/CD

ns0:entry.ns0:title: goharbor/harbor
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/goharbor/harbor
Language: go
An open source trusted cloud native registry project that stores, signs, and scans content.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: gravitational/teleport
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/gravitational/teleport
Language: go
The easiest, and most secure way to access and protect all of your infrastructure.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: hashicorp/terraform
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/hashicorp/terraform
Language: go
Terraform enables you to safely and predictably create, change, and improve infrastructure. It is a source-available tool that codifies APIs into declarative configuration files that can be shared amongst team members, treated as code, edited, reviewed, and versioned.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: hashicorp/terraform-provider-aws
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/hashicorp/terraform-provider-aws
Language: go
The AWS Provider enables Terraform to manage AWS resources.

URL: https://github.com/helm/helm
Language: go
The Kubernetes Package Manager

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/jetify-com/devbox
Language: go
Instant, easy, and predictable development environments

ns0:entry.ns0:title: kenn-io/agentsview
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/kenn-io/agentsview
Language: go
Local-first session intelligence and analytics for coding agents, supporting Claude Code, Codex, and more than 20 other agents. Also: 100x faster replacement for ccusage!

ns0:entry.ns0:title: keploy/keploy
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/keploy/keploy
Language: go
Open-source platform for creating safe, isolated production sandboxes for API, integration, and E2E testing.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: kserve/kserve
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/kserve/kserve
Language: go

ns0:entry.ns0:title: masterking32/MasterDnsVPN
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/masterking32/MasterDnsVPN
Language: go
Advanced DNS tunneling VPN for censorship bypass, optimized beyond DNSTT and SlipStream with low-overhead ARQ, resolver load balancing, high packet-loss stability and speed.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: opentofu/opentofu
ns0:entry.ns0:content:

Language: go
